concept.description: Generates a PlantUML component diagram of demo bundle dependencies.
concept.cypher: CALL { MATCH (s:Osgi:Bundle)-[d:DEPENDS_ON]->(t:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT s.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, s.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, t.bundleSymbolicName AS Target, t.bundleVersion AS TargetVersion, d.viaRequireBundle AS ViaRequireBundle, d.viaPackageWiring AS ViaPackageWiring, d.typeDependencyCount AS TypeDependencyCount, true AS Resolved UNION MATCH (s:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(rb:Osgi:RequiredBundle) WHERE NOT (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT s.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, s.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, rb.symbolicName AS Target, null AS TargetVersion, true AS ViaRequireBundle, false AS ViaPackageWiring, 0 AS TypeDependencyCount, false AS Resolved } RETURN Source, SourceVersion, Target, TargetVersion, ViaRequireBundle, ViaPackageWiring, TypeDependencyCount, Resolved ORDER BY Source, SourceVersion, Target, TargetVersion

concept.description: Generates an interactive HTML graph of demo bundle dependencies.
concept.cypher: CALL { MATCH (s:Osgi:Bundle)-[d:DEPENDS_ON]->(t:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT s.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, s.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, t.bundleSymbolicName AS Target, t.bundleVersion AS TargetVersion, d.viaRequireBundle AS ViaRequireBundle, d.viaPackageWiring AS ViaPackageWiring, d.typeDependencyCount AS TypeDependencyCount, true AS Resolved UNION MATCH (s:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(rb:Osgi:RequiredBundle) WHERE NOT (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT s.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, s.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, rb.symbolicName AS Target, null AS TargetVersion, true AS ViaRequireBundle, false AS ViaPackageWiring, 0 AS TypeDependencyCount, false AS Resolved } RETURN Source, SourceVersion, Target, TargetVersion, ViaRequireBundle, ViaPackageWiring, TypeDependencyCount, Resolved ORDER BY Source, SourceVersion, Target, TargetVersion

concept.description: Generates an interactive HTML graph of runtime bundle dependencies (excluding pure Java IMPLEMENTS relationships).
concept.cypher: CALL { MATCH (s:Osgi:Bundle)-[d:DEPENDS_ON_RUNTIME]->(t:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT s.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, s.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, t.bundleSymbolicName AS Target, t.bundleVersion AS TargetVersion, d.viaRequireBundle AS ViaRequireBundle, d.viaPackageWiring AS ViaPackageWiring, d.typeDependencyCount AS TypeDependencyCount, true AS Resolved UNION MATCH (s:Osgi:Bundle)-[:REQUIRES_BUNDLE]->(rb:Osgi:RequiredBundle) WHERE NOT (rb)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(:Osgi:Bundle) RETURN DISTINCT s.bundleSymbolicName AS Source, s.bundleVersion AS SourceVersion, rb.symbolicName AS Target, null AS TargetVersion, true AS ViaRequireBundle, false AS ViaPackageWiring, 0 AS TypeDependencyCount, false AS Resolved } RETURN Source, SourceVersion, Target, TargetVersion, ViaRequireBundle, ViaPackageWiring, TypeDependencyCount, Resolved ORDER BY Source, SourceVersion, Target, TargetVersion
